programme.title: Paranormal Prisons: Portal to Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Who is the bloody figure wielding a meat cleaver, seen racing through the alleys of British Columbia’s Chinatown? Whoever he is, he has terrified dozens of witnesses, who have never been the same afterwards. The brutal history of Cornwall Jail, Ottawa’s most notorious prison, lives on as ghostly apparitions of tortured inmates terrorize modern visitors. In its heyday it was home to vicious criminals, and sadistic guards. Hangings, whippings and torture were daily affairs and spirits from that era still linger on in the maze of cell blocks and corridors. Many male criminals were hanged at the Northwest Mounted Police outpost known as Fort Saskatchewan, but only one woman. Florence Lassandro was dubbed the Mob Princess, and her spirit is one of many seen on the grounds and in the preserved buildings of this historic site. Journey through several of the world's most haunted prisons and experience real portals to hell on earth.

programme.title: California Paranormal

programme.title: Nacho Mountain
programme.desc: Keefer has a talent. He can eat...A LOT. But it’s not until after getting fired from his job, finding his girl getting railed by a tranny and almost getting arrested for drug trafficking, that Keefer decides (with the help of his best friend Meegosh) to start an underground food eating competition. After the health crazed Mayor Fingstal and his cronies Officers Slivjack and Biggsley catch wind of it, all hell breaks loose. Then it all comes down to one final food battle from hell, THE NACHO MOUNTAIN! Set to a killer Stoner Rock soundtrack with loads of babes and crazy characters in the vein of Porky's and Meatballs, Nacho Mountain is sure to please those who have gotten beaten down, only to eat their way to the top!

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Water quality is everything—and the Star brite - SeaSafe team is back at it for the second year in a row! Led by Cory Redwine, Conservation Director of Project SeaSafe, this is the 4th Annual Clean Water Collective and it’s bigger than ever. This time, we’re in Grant, Florida, where 4 million clams are being released into the Indian River Lagoon, paired with the planting of thousands of mangroves, oyster work by CCA and trash clean ups to help restore one of Florida’s most critical ecosystems. But it’s not just about hard work—it’s about connection. With local captains, fishing legends, and the Local Knowledge crew on hand, we hit the water to show why this place is worth fighting for. From clam drops by drone, to in-water mangrove planting, to monster snook catches, this is hands-on conservation at its best. This two-part series kicks off with action, heart, and the kind of hope only a healthy waterway can bring. Don’t miss Part 1—where conservation meets community and everyone gets their hands wet.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: As part of this year's Star brite Sea Safe event, we hit the water to experience some of the incredible fishing the Indian River Lagoon has to offer. For Rush, that meant some serious bow time with close friend Alex Hughey - on the hunt for some of the biggest snook we've ever encountered. The bite wasn't easy, but that didn't stop Rush from smashing his personal best - not once, but twice - in one unforgettable day on the water. Don't miss this action-packed episode of the Sea Safe adventure from beautiful Sebastian, Florida!

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep104
programme.desc: Liquid Edge is surfing barrels on Hawaii’s North Shore, making friends with sharks, enjoying epic waterfalls in Mexico, traveling to Indonesia with professional surfers, hanging ten with one of longboarding’s beauties...and it’s not surfing if you aren’t getting slammed, plus plenty more on Liquid Edge.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The episode opens with contestant Geoff Rempel sharing his powerful backstory and the unique challenges of competing without a military or firearms background—proving that heart, not just experience, earns a place on this team. As the mission begins, the team links up with Pete from Red Cat Drones to run light recon and test critical communication between ground and aerial support. Red Cat brings the best of the best to the skies while the team takes to the ground on bikes, learning to operate under pressure with real-time air-to-ground coordination. But it’s not all strategy and tech—emotions run high as contestant Hayley Taylor opens up about her late father and the personal mission driving her to push harder every day. From aerial coverage to cover stories, it’s not just about who’s strongest... it’s about who’s ready when it counts.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day kicks off with a one-of-a-kind “hatting ceremony” as Don Mann is crowned—then quite literally set on fire. But there’s no time to admire the flames; Ken Shamrock is waiting with another round of punishing Lion’s Den training. With Iron Man training just one day away, the pressure is at an all-time high. Contestant Landon reflects on his past Surviving Mann experience, paying tribute to the mentors who guided him—and now stepping into that role himself. The countdown to mission time begins as gear is packed, coordinates plotted, and details roll in via Red Cat Drones. With the ISR team deployed, the first phase of the mission is underway. Every contestant must be ready to deliver their cover for status in an instant—because in this game, hesitation can be the difference between success and failure.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: This week, host Laura visits a family who has taken backyard farming to a whole new level. The Killpatrick family led by husband and father Michael is paving the way for the next generation of regenerative farming. This farm sprouted from the 2020 pandemic and in a few short years has become a pivotal cornerstone of their city community for all things holistic and organic. The Farm on Central is proving what can be accomplished with dedication to the future of farming.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: On this episode, Laura takes a trip to White Oak Pastures in Georgia to meet with pioneer and visionary, Will Harris. After two decades of monocultural farming, Will took his multi-generation farm into a completely new direction by turning it into a regenerative farm. Through trials and tribulations, Will and his family are paving the way for regenerative agriculture and educating the public on the importance of food education.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Our realtors were already superstars, but now it’s time to move them even higher. In this episode, you’ll learn what it takes to win at the highest levels from the 30-billion-dollar-man Jay Abraham, SEO wizard AJ Aluthwala, leadership powerhouse Nate Bailey, and mindset genius Michael Bernoff. They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (and anyone watching) into the stratosphere. So, grab your notepad and pay attention so you don't miss any golden nuggets from this episode of Beyond The Close!

programme.title: Autumn Exhilaration Nature Film
programme.desc: The exhilaration of autumn in the Colorado Rockies and High Sierras awaits you in our latest film release! Soar over the brilliant aspen forests of Colorado, immerse yourself in the glowing autumn leaves, and bask in the golden light of sunrise on the high mountain peaks. The inspiring scenery is accompanied by a soothing ambient music soundtrack. Available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv. Runtime 2.5 Hours.

programme.title: Preview for Journey Through Glacier National Park
programme.desc: Embark on a breathtaking "Journey Through Glacier National Park" in our newest release. Enjoy a serene visual escape into one of America’s most stunning National Parks. This immersive nature film captures the park’s majestic snowy mountains, shimmering glacial lakes, and crystal-clear rivers in stunning detail. Encounter native wildlife in their natural habitats and wander through alpine meadows blooming with vibrant wildflowers. Let the sights and sounds of Glacier National Park renew your spirit and connect you to the wild beauty of the natural world. The full 90 minute film is available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv.

programme.title: The Napa Valley - A Journey through America's Wine Country
